name: claude-astro-lsp
description: Astro code intelligence for Claude Code — on-demand diagnostics and optional full LSP

plugins.name: astro-check
plugins.description: On-demand Astro diagnostics via /astro-check:check — zero memory cost, runs astro check and exits

plugins.name: astro-lsp
plugins.description: Full Astro language server — real-time diagnostics, go-to-definition, references. ~400MB memory. For heavy editing sessions.
